name: Duplicate Submission Detection
description: Prevents duplicate action submission or replay execution by an autonomous agent.

name: Execution Scope Boundary Enforcement
description: Blocks actions exceeding the agent's configured autonomous authority limits.

name: Action Category Compliance Validation
description: Checks proposed actions against approved execution categories.

name: Counterparty Trust Validation
description: Restricts autonomous execution to verified, trusted counterparties.

name: Counterparty Destination Change Hold
description: Triggers governance review when execution destination is modified.

name: Dynamic Counterparty Trust Scoring
description: Continuously evaluates counterparty risk signals before execution.

name: Execution Exposure Threshold
description: Requires escalation above authority-defined exposure limits.

name: Pre-Execution Dependency Health Check
description: Confirms downstream system availability before action release.

name: Cross-Jurisdiction Execution Review
description: Applies heightened governance for actions spanning jurisdictions.

name: Segregation of Duties Enforcement
description: Prevents fully autonomous end-to-end execution without separation controls.

name: Override Audit Logging
description: Captures all governance overrides in the Decision Provenance Log.

name: Real-Time Governance Intervention
description: Allows immediate interruption of autonomous actions in-flight.

name: Execution Timing Anomaly Detection
description: Flags unusual execution timing relative to agent operating norms.

name: AI Confidence Auto-Release
description: Permits autonomous release when agent confidence exceeds threshold and risk is low.

name: High-Risk Jurisdiction Review
description: Applies jurisdiction-based risk governance to execution routing.

name: Exception Escalation Pathway
description: Routes execution exceptions for human authorization.

name: Emergency Execution Fast-Track
description: Controlled expedited execution pathway for exceptional circumstances.

name: Off-Hours Execution Restriction
description: Blocks execution during restricted operational windows.

name: Authority Chain Pre-Approval
description: Requires full authority chain validation before execution proceeds.

name: Contract Compliance Validation
description: Checks execution against contractual scope and obligations.
